steps.title: Find b using the axis of symmetry
steps.content: From the graph, the vertex is at $x = -1$. Apply the axis of symmetry formula with $a = 2$: $$-\frac{b}{4} = -1$$ $$b = 4$$

steps.title: Find c using the y-intercept
steps.content: At $x = 0$, the equation becomes $y = c$. The graph shows the parabola crossing the y-axis at $y = -6$, so $c = -6$.
